hey just found your profile and loved your work ! do you have a website ? i couldn't check your services 
v1:
Checking out your profile it looks super awesome and then I found that you could use of a website so I was curious if you ever thought about having a place where you can display your work to more eyes in a better way. Uh yeah, if that sounds like something that would interest you , you can shoot me a text . 

v2:
No worries at all.
I’ve worked with a few RV services around Texas, and I usually look at how competitors present their work online.
When I came across your profile, I was curious if you’d ever thought about having a website — something that shows your work clearly and helps with Google Maps visibility.

(small pause — important)

And since this wouldn’t be a remodel, I can actually put together a free design first.
If you like it, we can talk about a price that makes sense for you.
If not, no hard feelings at all — there’s no risk on your side.

If that sounds interesting, feel free to text me.
